title: Bohrium
description: Best Modpack For Stable Performance under "10" MODS
body:
# A Modpack Made for Stable Minecraft Gameplay

If you're tired of your Minecraft feeling laggy, stuttery, or inconsistent, this modpack is made exactly for you. Smooth & Stable focuses on delivering a clean, comfortable, and reliable gameplay experience without changing the core feel of the game.
No chaos, no unnecessary features just Minecraft, but vanilla smooth.

# System Requirements

Low System Requirements
Works great even on older PCs or laptops and also perfect if your hardware isn’t high-end.
